markers.evidence_type: higher in LE2 vs LE1; collecting lymphatic vessel marker
chemokine; lower in LE2 vs LE1

other_findings.finding: LE2 resembles PDPN+ collecting lymphatic vessels in human dermis

evidence_quotes.quote: two sub-clusters of lymphatic endothelial cells defined by the differential expression of CCL21 and PDPN, which are higher in LE1 and LE2 respectively
the latter resembling PDPN+ collecting lymphatic vessels in human dermis
